title: Native Runes
description: A Runes mod that will give you unimaginable power!
body:
![Native Runes Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a9577c1121891142554fefde9a6afaba33235a0.png)

## 🔥 A MOD created to help players who need instant potions, if you are in doubt, enter the MOD gallery.

🎮 **Gameplay**: Native Runes are items created/crafted in basic recipes, the last Rune that can be made is the **Rune of the Universe/Universe Rune** this Rune will give you the power to create the strongest tools in the MOD.

🚧 Each Rune will give you a specific power, example: The Wind Rune, will give you the power to float slowly in the air, consequently it will have a recharge time of 10 seconds more than the potion's available time, Example: Slow Fall Potion - 30 Seconds, Rune Cooldown - 40 Seconds, this rule does NOT apply to all Runes.

🥏 When right-clicking on each Rune, it will give you a specific effect. This does NOT apply to the following Runes: Glacier Rune, Day Rune and Lunar Rune.

✨ The Rune of the Universe will give you positive powers, each potion power/effect will have a time of 1000T or 50 Seconds, AND a recharge time of approximately 4000T or 200 Seconds.
